content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于 <t:1757939100:F>进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯*50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2025年9月29日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【更新内容】
一、综合
● 「剧情」当存在 2 行以上文本时，渐入、换行、停留效果有所调整，更容易阅读。
● 「派遣」奖励移除了收益上限，提高派遣唤醒体到一定等级可提升收益。
● 「档案馆」增加「再见永无乡」剧情CG与场景。
 
二、战斗
● 唤醒体「莱克」的天赋「灵塑适性」新增效果：莱克自身获取的黑印提高 40％~80％。
● 唤醒体「雷娅」的天赋「灵塑适性」新增效果：雷娅的力量获取效果提高 5~15％。
● 敌人「葬骸之主」觉醒后提高的生命降低了 66% ，觉醒后「残骸收取」获得的基础力量降低了 50%。
● 敌人「小蜜蜂」的意图「啼鸣」不再施加中毒效果。
● 敌人「陆战猫」和「搜查猫」的意图「低吼」施加的力量降低效果下降了 50%。
● 敌人「阿戈纳斯」和「奥格诺茨」的意图顺序有所调整，现在不会再连续释放强化效果。
● 敌人「蜕化者」的意图顺序有所调整，现在会每 2 回合释放 1 次「螫针」。
● 敌人「多维者」释放意图「融蚀进化」后的意图顺序，现在会在进化后的当回合就进行攻击。

三、问题修复
【偷取力量】
● 「偷取力量」效果的战斗内描述现在明确分为「力量获取部分」和「力量降低部分」，分别享受对应加成。
● 修复「偷取力量」实际与显示不统一问题：此前部分「偷取力量」描述中，由于其数值显示错误享受了「力量获取效果」加成，导致实际逻辑造成的力量降低效果与显示描述不符，现已修复显示错误问题。
● 唤醒体「戈利亚」的技能「强者为尊」激活启灵「一山二虎」时的效果描述。新效果描述为：临时移除所有敌人的力量，并获得等同于移除量的临时力量。
● 更换了「力量降低」效果的图标，与「力量获取」效果区分。
 
【战斗】
● 修复了敌人「葬骸之主」意图「残骸收取」即使在没有「残骸」时，也会提高最大生命的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「哈姆林」超限爆发描述缺乏「穿刺伤害」文本的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「菲茵特」的指令卡「养分汲取」力量获取效果文本描述未显示出享受力量加成的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「皮克曼」的指令卡「蚀骨色彩」、唤醒体「塔薇」的指令卡「四翼渐生」力量获取效果未正确享受命轮「隐世的转轮」、「诗笺的句尾」加成的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「塔薇」的指令卡「通晓万物之理」变为唤醒体「奥尔拉」的指令卡且获得「隐喻」时，再次变化为其它卡牌后「隐喻」效果依然存在的问题。
● 修复了敌人「劳伦斯先生」的意图「撕裂打击」效果描述缺少了「施加等量出血」的问题。
● 修复了「算力」说明描述中错误包含了「每回合算力上限+1」的问题。（英文版列为已知问题。）
 
【一般】
● 修复了「通讯」中角色「皮克曼」签名未显示的问题。
● 修复了「忘却篇」调查行动 「4-11」首领战中反复出现提示语的问题。
● 修复了「剧情」中使用「×4」倍速预览2行以上文本时，可能出现无法自动下滑、未看全文本就跳转下一段的问题。
● 修复了「调查」中部分语言关卡成就信息显示不完全的问题。
● 修复了「校友会」中所有好友都处于“正在闲逛”状态的问题。
● 修复了「派遣」中一键领取后未继续进行派遣时，任务异常亮起和额外奖励数量显示异常的问题。
 
【英文本地化】
● 修复了唤醒体「皮克曼」、「克莱门汀」命轮数字描述显示错误的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「皮克曼」的技能描述中「创构」措辞不统一的问题。
● 优化了钥令道具描述的翻译，使术语措辞一致。
● 增加了志愿者贡献的第一批翻译，具体请见官方Discord的志愿者贡献列表。志愿者名单已更新在特别感谢页面，再次感谢各位志愿者的帮助！

**V2.3.2.3 Online Maintenance Announcement**

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on <t:1757937900:F>. You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
 
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver*50
 
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on September 29, 2025 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailbox in time to claim the supply materials.
 
[Update Content]
I. Comprehensive
● When there are more than 2 lines of "story" text, the fade-in, line break, and pause effects are adjusted for easier reading.
● The "Assignment" rewards have removed the profit cap, and raising the assigned Awakeners to a certain level can increase the rewards.
● The "Archive" adds "Farewell Neverland" story CG and scenes.

2. Battle
● The Awakener "Ryker" gains a new effect for the talent "Soulforge Aptitude": the Black Sigils Ryker acquires increase by 40%~80%.
● The Awakener "Leigh" has a new talent effect for "Soulforge Aptitude": The effect of Leigh's strength acquisition is increased by 5~15%.
● The HP increase of the enemy "Lord of Necrovia" upon Rousing is reduced by 66%, and the base Strength gained from "Corpse Collection" after Rousing is reduced by 50%.
● The enemy "Little Bee" will no longer inflict Poison effects with its intention "Cry".
● The enemy's "Cat Warrior" and "Cat Detective" intention "Growl" applies a 50% reduction in Strength Reduction effect.
● The intention order of the enemies "Argonas" and "Ognotz" has been adjusted, and they will no longer unleash Enhance effects consecutively.
● The intention sequence of the enemy "Metamorph" has been adjusted, and it will now unleash "Stinging Needle" once every 2 turns.
● The enemy "Multidimensional Entity" will now attack in the same turn after releasing the intention "Dissolution Evolution."

3. Problem Fix
[STR Steal]
● The in-battle description of the "STR Steal" effect is now clearly divided into "Strength Gain" and "Strength Reduction" sections, each benefiting from their respective bonuses.
● Fixed the inconsistency between the actual and displayed effects of "STR Steal": Previously, some descriptions of "STR Steal" incorrectly benefited from the "Strength Gain Effect" due to a numerical display error, causing the actual logic of the strength reduction effect to be inconsistent with the displayed description. The display error has now been corrected.
● The skill "Law of the Strongest" of the Awakener "Goliath" activates the effect description of Enlighten "Rule by the Strongest". The new effect description is: Temporarily remove all enemies' Strength and gain Temporary STR equal to the amount removed.
● Changed the icon for the "STR▼" effect to distinguish it from the "Strength Gain" effect.
 
[Battle]
● Fixed the issue where the enemy "Lord of Necrovia" would increase max HP with the intention of "Corpse Collection" even when there were no "Corpses".
● Fixed the issue where the description of the Awakener "Hameln" Over-Exaltation lacked the "Pierce DMG" text.
● Fixed the issue where the Command Card "Nutrient Absorption" of the Awakener "Faint" did not display the description of the Strength gain effect benefiting from the bonus.
● Fixed the issue where the Command Card "Chromaphage" of the Awakener "Pickman" and the Command Card "Four Wings" of the Awakener "Tawil" did not correctly receive the bonuses from the Wheels of Destiny "Wheel Unseen" and "The Last Verse" for Strength gain effects.
● Fixed the issue where the command card "Omniscient Verity" of the Awakener "Tawil" would transform into the command card of the Awakener "Horla" and retain the "Metaphor" effect even after changing to other cards again.
● Fixed the issue where the effect description of the enemy "Mr. Lawrence"'s intention "Rending Strike" was missing "applies equal Bleed."
● Fixed the issue in the description of "Arithmetica" that incorrectly included "Arithmetica Max +1 each turn." (Listed as a known issue in the English version.)

[Normal]
● Fixed the issue where the signature of the character "Pickman" was not displayed in "Communication."
● Fixed the issue of repeated hints appearing in "Faded Legacy" Investigation Operation "4-11" Boss Battle.
● Fixed the issue in the "Story" where using "×4" speed to preview more than 2 lines of text may result in the inability to auto-scroll and skipping to the next segment without viewing the entire text.
● Fixed the issue where some language level achievement information was not fully displayed in the "Investigation".
● Fixed the issue where all friends in the "Alumni" were in the "Wandering" state.
● Fixed the issue where tasks would improperly highlight and display an incorrect number of extra rewards when no further assignments were made after one-click claiming in "Assignment".
 
[English Localization]
● Fixed the issue with the numerical description display error for Pickman and Clementine's Wheels of Destiny.
● Fixed the inconsistency in wording of "Painted Relics" in Pickman's skill descriptions.
● Optimized the translation of Posse item descriptions for consistent terminology.
● The first batch of translations contributed by volunteers has been added. For details, please refer to the Volunteer Contributions List on the official Discord. The volunteer list has been updated on the Special Thanks page. Thank you again for the help from all volunteers!

喔不派遣變成了另類的吃資源惡夢了
雖然大佬應該都不缺那些經驗跟資源<:cry3:1356082134447558748>
蛤，不是240後增加嗎，不用額外吃吧

如果想貪最高值等於要8×4個90等
不過這跟付出應該跟收入不成正比說一嘴而已<:cute1:1356053053568192717>

應該是單純角色等級高的人
有增加一些收益，不用特別去拚
